text:
On this page there are two menu options, the Direct Manual Query and the Library.  

Schematics are added to the library as you complete them, or, surpass them in tier.  This means that as you progress in tier, the undiscovered schematics of the tier you just completed are automatically unlocked.

To craft schematics at your tier that are not already in your library, you must enter their name in the Direct Manual Query menu.  Other restrictions on accessing schematics still apply, directly accessings  schematics above your access level is not possible.

In practice, this means that to progress through each tier you must recieve requests from clients for new compounds at your current tier, adding to your library, and taking you one step closer to your next promotion.
